titleStmt.title: SII 25.92: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 92. (A.R. No. 92 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

The date portion of the record is mutilated. The cyclic year Pramōdūta during the reign period of this king corresponds to Śaka 1432 and in the Dakshiṇāyana of that year śu 12, Monday, U[ttiraṭṭādi]-nakshatra may be equated with 1510 A.D., October 14, f.d.n. 13. This is in the month of Tulā only.

This incomplete record semms to register the grant of 48 shares and 52 house-sites (maṉai) at Karaiyūr and Nāraṇamaṅgalam in Kēraḷaśiṅgavaḷanāḍu in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam by Bhairava-nayiṉār, son of Dakshiṇāmūrtibhaṭṭar Ādityadēvar of Kāñchīpuram belonging to Bhārgava-gōtra and Bōdhāyana-sūtra, as vipra-bhāga (share for the brāhmaṇas) to Chellappa for the study of vēdas and Purāṇas (addhyayana-vṛitti and Purāṇa-vṛitti)

The order recording the aforesaid grant, made for the merit of Vīra Narasiṁharāya-nāyakkar alias Chellappar was issued to the aśēsha-vidvanmahājanas of the different gōtras and sūtras, on the date mentioned earlier.

Chellappar (Śellappar) alias Vīra Narasiṁha is known to us from the previous record, wherein too, the gift was made for his merit. The honorific title Svāmi mentioned for him in the record No. 91 of 1908 indicate that he was a powerful chief or viceroy. He has been identified with Narasiṁharāya or Narasa-nāyaka, the father of Kṛishṇadēvarāya in the Report. (See, A.R.Ep, 1909, para 69, page. 116). V. Rangachari had suggested that he is identical with his namesake who figures and styles as ubhayapradhāni in a record from Chingleput dated Śaka 1450. (Same as, A.R.Ep., 1909, No. 233, Ind. Ant., Vol. XLIII, pp 45-46).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rājādhirājan
virapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇayadevamahārāya
paṇṇiyaruḷāniṉṟa śakāptam tta
cellāniṉṟa pramodūta varṣattu dakṣi
yaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu dvādaśiy somavā
nakṣatramum vyatipādayogamum peṟṟa U Probably uttiraṭṭāti is intended.
ṇya kālattile śrīman vīranarasiṅharāya nāyakkarāṉa
cellappaṟku puṇyamāka bhārggavagotrattu bauteya naRead bodhāyana
sūtrattu śrīkāñcipuram dakṣiṇāmūrttibhaṭṭar Ādityadevar putrar śrīma
tu bhairanayiṉār nānāgotrattu nānāsūtra Aśeṣavidvanmahā
jaṉaṅkaḷukkum dharmmaśāsaṉappaṭṭayam koṭuttapaṭi . pāṇṭi maṇṭa
lattu keraḷa ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu kāraiyūrum nāraṇamaṅkalamum tiruc
cellappapurattukku vaiprabhāgam Addhyanavṛtti purāṇavṛtti Uṭpaṭa
sahiraṇyodhaka dhārāpūrvvamāka koṭutta bhāgam 4 10 8 maṉai 5 10 2
Inta bhāgam 2 nāṟpatteṭṭum maṉai Aimpattiraṇṭukkum Ellaiyāvatu ki
ḻpāṟkellai Āmaṇattāṇṭāṉ Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkel
lai velaṅkuṭi Ellaikkum tiruppattūr Ellaikkum māṅkuṭi Ellaikkum va
ṭakkum melpāṟkellai cempaṅkuṭi EllaikkuRest in lost.
Digital edition of SII 25.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
